## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing behavior it affects.

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Docs updated when endpoint, config, or deployment behavior changed

## Security Notes

Call out auth, token, privacy, SSRF, rate-limit, federation, or deployment impact.
Do not include real secrets, tokens, raw IPs, or production telemetry.
